subject: A young girl with short purple hair, dressed in dark layered clothing, depicted in a dynamic pose with a playful or mischievous expression against an urban or industrial background
description: A small figure with short purple hair in dark layered garments is shown mid-motion, leaning or lunging with a lively, impish energy. The background suggests an urban or structured environment with muted tones. The overall composition reads as playful and quick — consistent with the 'Mischief' framing of the card name. The figure's posture is expressive and loose.
foreground: Small humanoid figure with purple hair in dark clothing
